args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_json(locals()['var_function-call-2569704471855068849'])

df['Up Day'] = df['Close'] > df['Open']
df['Down Day'] = df['Close'] < df['Open']

up_days_count = df.groupby('Index')['Up Day'].sum()
down_days_count = df.groupby('Index')['Down Day'].sum()

result = pd.DataFrame({'Up Days': up_days_count, 'Down Days': down_days_count})
result = result[result['Up Days'] > result['Down Days']]

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result.index.tolist())

import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_json(locals()['var_function-call-2569704471855068849'])

df['Up Day'] = df['Close'] > df['Open']
df['Down Day'] = df['Close'] < df['Open']

up_days_count = df.groupby('Index')['Up Day'].sum()
down_days_count = df.groupby('Index')['Down Day'].sum()

result = pd.DataFrame({'Up Days': up_days_count, 'Down Days': down_days_count})
result = result[result['Up Days'] > result['Down Days']]

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result.index.tolist()))

import pandas as pd
import json

df = pd.read_json(locals()['var_function-call-2569704471855068849'])

df['Up Day'] = df['Close'] > df['Open']
df['Down Day'] = df['Close'] < df['Open']

up_days_count = df.groupby('Index')['Up Day'].sum()
down_days_count = df.groupby('Index')['Down Day'].sum()

result = pd.DataFrame({'Up Days': up_days_count, 'Down Days': down_days_count})
result = result[result['Up Days'] > result['Down Days']]

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(result.index.tolist()))
